creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
(In reply to Anton Saietskii from comment #5)
> simple logic says port breakage (which, again, can be easily prevented) three
> times in a row and four times total with the exact same reason is simply not
> right

When I added this patch, someone warned me of exactly this problem we've been seeing. Moving the patch to the tree would've proved him right, and I just could not do that...

Anyway, Bug 281680 now contains the upgrade to 4.0 (which already incorporates the controversial patch and a couple of others). Please, test and provide feedback there.

Thank you.
